steps.title: Isolate the variable
steps.content:
Start with the inequality and solve for $y$:
$$2x-y>901$$
$$-y>901-2x$$
$$y<2x-901$$

steps.title: Find the allowed values
steps.content: Evaluate the upper bound for each listed value. For $x=449$, $y<-3$; for $x=450$, $y<-1$; and for $x=451$, $y<1$.

steps.title: Match the valid table
steps.content: The table with pairs $(449,-4)$, $(450,-2)$, and $(451,0)$ satisfies all three restrictions. The answer is D.
